[cron:4fe135b5-7edc-4978-a296-b11aae2afaa5 09:25网页账本主源A股实盘日报] bash -c 'python3 /Users/ling/.openclaw/workspace/quant_projects/personal-a-share-research-system/scripts/is_trading_day.py --silent && cat <<"ENDOFTASK"
🔍 首先检查今天是否为A股交易日：运行 python3 /Users/ling/.openclaw/workspace/quant_projects/personal-a-share-research-system/scripts/is_trading_day.py --json。如果 is_trading_day 为 false，直接回复 NO_REPLY 并停止，不执行任何后续步骤。\n\n仅当 is_trading_day 为 true 时，才继续执行：\n执行以下任务：1. 进入 /Users/ling/.openclaw/workspace-coding-agent；2. 运行 python3 scripts/run_web_source_fusion_daily.py --output-dir /Users/ling/.openclaw/workspace/quant_projects/personal-a-share-research-system/research/reports --push-feishu --notify-on-failure；3. 若成功，只返回 SUCCESS、web_source_fusion_daily_latest.json 路径、a-share-fusion-report_latest_message.txt 路径；4. 若失败，只返回 FAILED_CLOSED、runner json 路径与原因。
ENDOFTASK
'
Current time: Monday, May 4th, 2026 - 9:25 AM (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-05-04 01:25 UTC

Use the message tool if you need to notify the user directly for the current chat. If you do not send directly, your final plain-text reply will be delivered automatically.
